query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN authorDescriptionJson IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_description,
  SUM(CASE WHEN authorDescriptionJson LIKE '%"overallConfidence":"high"%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as high_confidence,
  SUM(CASE WHEN authorDescriptionJson LIKE '%"overallConfidence":"medium"%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as medium_confidence,
  SUM(CASE WHEN authorDescriptionJson LIKE '%"overallConfidence":"low"%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as low_confidence
FROM author_profiles;

  SUM(CASE WHEN authorDescriptionJson LIKE '%"overallConfidence":"medium"%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as medium_confidence,
  SUM(CASE WHEN authorDescriptionJson LIKE '%"overallConfidence":"low"%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as low_confidence
